title: Modpack Manager
description: Allows the modpack creators to make changes in the game interface. New visuals included!
body:
Are you tired of installing too many mods for interface changes?

Are you tired of not finding an update check tool mod for your modpack?

---

So this is for YOU! a Modpack Manager.

A Loyal assistant
---
I designed this mod to make things easier for the modpack creators. And it has some features! You can change the window title, And check for a newly released update. You can change and adjust values in the config file as it suits you!
 
It's a client-side mod! You don't have to install it on the server. For more information on how to get started, Visit the Wiki page!
# Dependencies: - FancyMenu 2.3.6+ (Optional) # Mod Features: - Update Check Function (It will add a new button to the title screen! And you can now check if there is a new update available) - Window Title Changer (It's not just a title changer! It has a lot of functions than you think.)  - FancyMenu Compatibility (It has compatibility with FancyMenu Mod! You can use the same features in more stylish ways)  - Durability Display (It shows the durability on top of the items in-game UI, and you can switch OFF/ON and change the display size via KeyBinds whenever you want!) # Future Planning: - Custom Loading Screen - Customizable HUD # More Suggestions: If you have any ideas that you think I should consider adding in the next update, Don't hesitate to write them down on the [GitHub page!](https://github.com/ixDarkLorD/ModpackManager/labels/enhancement/) I will appreciate it. # FAQ: ### Can I use this mod in my modpack? - Sure! You can use it freely.   ### Can I repost this mod on another website? - No! Let's be sensible. It's like when you worked hard on something and got stolen in the end!
